title: Light Your Way Candles | Strong Scented | Rhubarb and Custard Scented | Moon n Sun | Wax Melts | for Wax Warmer | Wax Burner
features: NATURAL SOY WAX MELTS – Made from natural soy wax, these hand poured wax tarts provide a clean burn and are easy to use. Wax melts does not need a wick flame to emit its fragrance which is a safer alternative to traditional candles, so you can enjoy without the worry of a flame.

Intended for use with electric wax melt burners, plug in wax warmers, and candle warmers. Simply add your wax melt to your wax warmer and enjoy the scent. these wax melts will fill your room with a delightful aroma. Perfect for entryways, bedrooms, living rooms, bathrooms, offices, dens.
Gift Set - Relaxing and comforting scented waxes for ambience and guests. These waxes make great gifts, Easter basket and stocking stuffers, holiday party supplies, ALSO it’s good for Christmas gift
description: Our Moon n Sun Wax Melt is the perfect addition to any home decor. This unique wax melt features a beautiful moon and sun shape, adding a touch of celestial charm to any room. Choose from our wide selection of scents to create a personalized sensory experience. Made with high-quality soy wax, this wax melt burns cleanly and evenly, providing hours of delightful fragrance. Bring a little piece of the universe into your home with our Moon n Sun Wax Melt.
